# Nimbus Framework — Comprehensive Audit Report

**Date:** March 14, 2026  
**Scope:** Full gap analysis against Laravel/Rails/Django feature parity  

---

## 1. Database (`database/`)

### EXISTS
| File | Feature |
|------|---------|
| `database.go` | Connection manager (Postgres, MySQL, SQLite via GORM), debug mode |
| `query.go` | Query builder (Where, OrWhere, WhereNull, WhereNotNull, Select, OrderBy, Limit, Offset, First, Get) |
| `model.go` | Base model with ID, CreatedAt, UpdatedAt, DeletedAt (soft delete via gorm.DeletedAt) |
| `scopes.go` | Reusable scopes (WhereScope, OrderScope, LatestScope, WhenScope), soft delete helpers (WithTrashed, OnlyTrashed, Restore, ForceDelete, IsTrashed), Chunk, Exists, FirstOrCreate, UpdateOrCreate, Pluck, CountBy |
| `relations.go` | Eager loading via `Preload()` wrapper |
| `relations_tags.go` | Nimbus relation tags: `belongsTo`, `hasMany`, `hasOne`, `manyToMany` — parsed via struct tag reflection |
| `pagination.go` | Offset pagination with URL generation, meta, range helpers |
| `transaction.go` | Transaction wrapper (Transaction, TransactionWithDB) |
| `hooks.go` | Model lifecycle hooks (Before/AfterCreate, Update, Save, Delete) via GORM callbacks |
| `events.go` | DB event broadcasting (db:query, db:insert, db:update, db:delete) with duration tracking |
| `serialize.go` | Serialization with Omit/Pick (hidden fields), IsDirty helper |
| `factory.go` | Model factories with basic Faker (Sentence, Email, Word, Int) |
| `notification.go` | DatabaseNotification model, NotificationStore with Send/All/Unread/Read/MarkAsRead |
| `cache.go` | CachedFind — query result caching via cache.Remember |
| `create.go` | CreateDatabaseIfNotExists for Postgres and MySQL |
| `metadata.go` | AutoPreload (RelationProvider/tag-based), TableNamer, FillableProvider, TableNameFor |
| `migrate.go` | Migration runner with batches, rollback, status, fresh, schema_migrations table |
| `seed.go` | Seeder interface + SeedRunner |
| `schema/schema.go` | Schema builder (CreateTable, DropTable) with column types: Increments, BigIncrements, String, Integer, BigInteger, Boolean, Text, DateTime, Timestamp, Decimal, Float, JSON, JSONB, UUID, Enum, Binary, Timestamps, SoftDeletes, indexes |

### MISSING
| Gap | Priority |
|-----|----------|
| **Cursor pagination** (keyset-based, for infinite scroll) | Important |
| **morphTo / morphMany / morphToMany** (polymorphic relations) | Important |
| **hasManyThrough / hasOneThrough** relations | Important |
| **Model casting** (auto-cast JSON columns, dates, enums to Go types) | Nice-to-have |
| **Accessors/Mutators** (get/set attribute transformers) | Nice-to-have |
| **UUID primary key support** as BaseModel variant | Nice-to-have |
| **Guarded fields** (mass-assignment protection — FillableProvider exists but no enforcement) | Important |
| **Raw query helper** (`database.Raw(sql, args)` returning rows) | Important |
| **Query builder: WhereIn, WhereBetween, WhereHas, GroupBy, Having, Join, SubQuery, Aggregate (Sum, Avg, Max, Min)** | Critical |
| **Database observers** (dedicated observer classes separate from hooks) | Nice-to-have |
| **Model events dispatched through events system** (currently only raw DB events) | Important |
| **Multiple database connections** (read/write replicas, named connections) | Important |
| **Connection pooling configuration** (MaxOpenConns, MaxIdleConns, ConnMaxLifetime) | Important |

---

## 2. HTTP Layer (`http/`)

### EXISTS
| File | Feature |
|------|---------|
| `context.go` | Request context with Set/Get/MustGet, Param, QueryInt, JSON, String, Redirect, View, Status |
| `net.go` | Re-exports of net/http types (Handler, Request, ResponseWriter, Cookie, status codes, methods, Dir, FileSystem) |

### MISSING
| Gap | Priority |
|-----|----------|
| **Request input helpers** (`c.Input("key")`, `c.All()`, `c.Only("name","email")`, `c.Except(...)`, `c.Has("key")`) | Critical |
| **File upload helpers on Context** (`c.File("avatar")` returning UploadedFile) | Critical |
| **Cookie helpers on Context** (`c.Cookie("name")`, `c.SetCookie(...)`) | Critical |
| **Query string helpers** (`c.Query("key", default)`, `c.QueryArray(...)`) | Critical |
| **Form data binding** (`c.Bind(&struct{})` for JSON + form + query combined) | Critical |
| **Response: Download** (`c.Download(filepath, filename)`) | Important |
| **Response: Stream** (`c.Stream(func(w io.Writer))`) | Important |
| **Response: SSE** (`c.SSE(func(event SSEWriter))`) | Important |
| **Response: NoContent** (`c.NoContent()`) | Nice-to-have |
| **Content negotiation** (`c.Accepts("json","html")`, `c.WantsJSON()`) | Important |
| **IP helpers** (`c.IP()`, `c.IPs()` with trusted proxy support) | Important |
| **Request: IsAjax, IsSecure, FullUrl, Method** helpers | Nice-to-have |
| **Automatic request body size limit** on context | Nice-to-have |

---

## 3. Router (`router/`)

### EXISTS
| File | Feature |
|------|---------|
| `router.go` | Chi-backed router, global middleware, named routes, URL generation, route listing, Mount, ServeHTTP, Any, Route |
| `route.go` | Route with chaining: As (naming), Describe, Tag, Body, Returns, Secure, DeprecatedRoute + RouteMeta for OpenAPI |
| `group.go` | Route groups with prefix and middleware |
| `resource.go` | RESTful resource routes (7 actions), ApiOnly, Only, Except options |

### MISSING
| Gap | Priority |
|-----|----------|
| **Route model binding** (auto-resolve `:id` to a model instance in handler) | Important |
| **Sub-domain routing** (`router.Domain("api.example.com", func(g *Group){...})`) | Nice-to-have |
| **Fallback routes** (`router.Fallback(handler)` for 404 catch-all) | Important |
| **Route caching / compilation** (serialize route table for faster startup) | Nice-to-have |
| **Per-route rate limiting** (`route.RateLimit(100, time.Minute)` chainable) | Important |
| **Per-route middleware** (`route.Middleware(auth)` chainable on individual routes) | Critical |
| **Nested resource routes** (`router.Resource("posts.comments", ...)`) | Nice-to-have |
| **Route constraints/regex** (`:id` must be numeric) | Nice-to-have |

---

## 4. Testing (`testing/`)

### EXISTS
| File | Feature |
|------|---------|
| `testing.go` | Full HTTP TestClient (Get/Post/Put/Patch/Delete/PostJSON/PostForm), TestResponse with assertions (AssertStatus, AssertOK, AssertCreated, AssertNotFound, AssertRedirect, AssertHeader, AssertContains, AssertJSON, AssertJSONPath), NewAppTestClient |
| `database.go` | RefreshDatabase (transaction-per-test), TruncateTables, SeedDatabase |
| `fakes.go` | FakeMailer (captures sent emails with assertions), FakeQueue (captures dispatched jobs with assertions) |

### MISSING
| Gap | Priority |
|-----|----------|
| **Database assertions** (`AssertDatabaseHas("users", map)`, `AssertDatabaseMissing(...)`, `AssertDatabaseCount(...)`) | Critical |
| **Factory integration in tests** (shorthand: `factory.Create(&User{})` returns model instance) | Important |
| **Fake notification channel** | Nice-to-have |
| **Fake storage driver** | Nice-to-have |
| **Fake event dispatcher** (assert events were dispatched) | Important |
| **Time travel / freeze helpers** | Nice-to-have |
| **Parallel test helpers** | Nice-to-have |
| **AssertValidationErrors** helper | Nice-to-have |

---

## 5. Storage (`storage/`)

### EXISTS
| File | Feature |
|------|---------|
| `storage.go` | Driver interface (Put, Get, Delete, Exists), LocalDriver |
| `upload.go` | UploadedFile (Name, Size, Extension, MimeType, Store, StoreAs, StoreRandomName, IsValid), PutFromRequest, SignedURLGenerator (TemporaryURL, Verify), ServeSignedFiles, AllowedExtensions, MaxFileSize |

### MISSING
| Gap | Priority |
|-----|----------|
| **S3 driver** (AWS S3 / compatible) | Critical |
| **GCS driver** (Google Cloud Storage) | Important |
| **Azure Blob driver** | Nice-to-have |
| **Storage Facade** (global `storage.Put()` using default driver, `storage.Disk("s3")`) | Critical |
| **Public URL generation** (`driver.URL(path)`) | Important |
| **File move/copy** (`driver.Move(from, to)`, `driver.Copy(from, to)`) | Important |
| **Directory listing** (`driver.Files(dir)`, `driver.Directories(dir)`) | Important |
| **File metadata** (size, lastModified without reading content) | Nice-to-have |

---

## 6. Cache (`cache/`)

### EXISTS
| File | Feature |
|------|---------|
| `cache.go` | Global Set/Get/Delete/Has/Missing/Pull/SetForever/Remember/RememberT (generics) |
| `store.go` | Store interface (Set, Get, Delete, Remember) |
| `boot.go` | Boot with driver auto-detection from env (memory, redis, memcached, dynamodb, cloudflare) |
| `memory.go` | In-memory store |
| `redis.go` | Redis store |
| `memcached.go` | Memcached store |
| `dynamodb.go` | DynamoDB store |
| `cloudflare.go` | Cloudflare KV store |
| `invalidate.go` | Prefix-based invalidation |
| `namespace.go` | Namespaced stores with Clear |

### MISSING
| Gap | Priority |
|-----|----------|
| **Cache tags** (tag-based invalidation: `cache.Tags("users","posts").Put(...)`) | Important |
| **Cache locks** (atomic distributed locks: `cache.Lock("key").Get(fn)`) | Important |
| **Atomic increment/decrement** (`cache.Increment("key", 1)`) | Important |
| **Flush all** (`cache.Flush()`) | Nice-to-have |
| **Cache events** (hit/miss/write events) | Nice-to-have |
| **TTL retrieval** (`cache.GetWithTTL(key)`) | Nice-to-have |

---

## 7. Queue (`queue/`)

### EXISTS
| File | Feature |
|------|---------|
| `job.go` | Job interface, FailedJob, Tagger, Silenced, JobFunc |
| `adapter.go` | Adapter interface (Push, Pop, Len), CompletableAdapter, JobPayload |
| `manager.go` | Manager with register/dispatch/process, DispatchBuilder (OnQueue, Delay, Retries, Priority), Observer, serialization |
| `queue.go` | In-memory worker pool (legacy) |
| `redis.go` | Redis adapter |
| `database.go` | Database adapter |
| `sqs.go` | AWS SQS adapter |
| `kafka.go` | Kafka adapter |
| `sync.go` | Synchronous adapter |
| `failed.go` | FailedJobStore interface + registry (List, Get, Forget, ForgetAll, Retry) |
| `redis_failed.go` | Redis failed job store |
| `ratelimit.go` | Rate-limited adapter wrapper |
| `scheduler.go` | Queue-level scheduler |
| `queue_public.go` | Public dispatch helpers |

### MISSING
| Gap | Priority |
|-----|----------|
| **Job chaining** (`queue.Chain(job1, job2, job3).Dispatch()`) | Important |
| **Job batching** (`queue.Batch(jobs...).Then(callback).Dispatch()`) | Important |
| **Unique jobs** (prevent duplicate dispatches for same job+payload) | Important |
| **Retry backoff strategies** (exponential, linear, custom) | Important |
| **Job middleware** (wrap job execution with cross-cutting concerns) | Nice-to-have |
| **Horizon dashboard integration** (config-driven workers — partially via Observer) | Nice-to-have |
| **Database failed job store** (only Redis exists) | Important |

---

## 8. Config (`config/`)

### EXISTS
| File | Feature |
|------|---------|
| `config.go` | Basic Config struct, .env loading via godotenv, Load() |
| `loader.go` | LoadFromEnv, AddEnvMapping, LoadAuto, dot-notation store |
| `get.go` | Generic Get[T], Must[T], GetOrDefault[T] with type conversion |
| `schema.go` | LoadInto (struct-based config with `config`, `env`, `default` tags) |

### MISSING
| Gap | Priority |
|-----|----------|
| **Config caching** (serialize config to binary for faster cold start) | Nice-to-have |
| **Set at runtime** (`config.Set("app.debug", true)`) | Important |
| **Config merging** (multiple .env files: `.env.local`, `.env.test`, `.env.production`) | Important |
| **Nested map access** (`config.Get[map[string]any]("database")`) | Nice-to-have |
| **Config validation** (required keys, type checks at boot) | Important |
| **Config watching** (reload on file change in dev mode) | Nice-to-have |

---

## 9. CLI (`cli/`)

### EXISTS
| File | Feature |
|------|---------|
| `commands/serve.go` | Dev server with hot-reload |
| `commands/new.go` | Project scaffolding |
| `commands/make.go` | Make commands (controller, model, migration, job, validator, middleware, seeder) |
| `commands/make_auth.go` | Auth scaffolding |
| `commands/make_api_token.go` | API token generation |
| `commands/make_deploy.go` | Deployment config generation |
| `commands/db.go` | db:migrate, db:rollback, db:status, db:seed, db:fresh |
| `commands/build.go` | Production build |
| `commands/deploy.go` | Deploy to cloud platforms |
| `commands/release.go` | Release management |
| `commands/repl.go` | Interactive REPL (tinker equivalent) |
| `commands/testgen.go` | Test generation |
| `commands/horizon.go` | Horizon plugin commands |
| `commands/plugin.go` | Plugin management |
| `commands/ai.go` | AI-powered commands |
| `commands/misc.go` | Miscellaneous utilities |
| `generators/` | Code generation templates |

### MISSING
| Gap | Priority |
|-----|----------|
| **route:list** (print all registered routes — partially in router.PrintRoutes but no CLI command) | Important |
| **route:cache** | Nice-to-have |
| **config:cache / config:clear** | Nice-to-have |
| **cache:clear, cache:table** | Important |
| **queue:work, queue:listen, queue:retry, queue:failed, queue:flush** | Critical |
| **schedule:run, schedule:list** | Important |
| **storage:link** (create public symlink) | Nice-to-have |
| **make:notification, make:event, make:listener, make:resource, make:policy** | Important |
| **key:generate** (generate APP_KEY) | Important |
| **db:wipe** (drop all tables) | Nice-to-have |
| **make:factory** | Nice-to-have |
| **notifications:table** (create notifications migration) | Nice-to-have |
| **env:encrypt / env:decrypt** | Nice-to-have |

---

## 10. Security

### EXISTS
| Component | Location | Feature |
|-----------|----------|---------|
| CSRF | `middleware/middleware.go` | CSRF middleware with header + form token validation, MemoryCSRFStore, token generator |
| CSRF (Shield) | `packages/shield/` | Full CSP + CSRF plugin with config |
| Shield | `shield/shield.go` | AI-powered request protection (SQLi, XSS, path traversal, command injection, prompt injection, bot detection, rate burst, header anomalies) |
| Hashing | `hash/hash.go` | bcrypt Make/Check |
| Auth | `auth/` | Session guard, token guard (personal access tokens), policies/gates, social auth, email verification, password reset, middleware |
| Signed URLs | `storage/upload.go` | SignedURLGenerator with TemporaryURL + Verify |

### MISSING
| Gap | Priority |
|-----|----------|
| **Encryption/Decryption service** (`crypt.Encrypt(data)`, `crypt.Decrypt(data)` using APP_KEY) | Critical |
| **XSS sanitization helpers** (beyond template escaping — `sanitize.Clean(html)`) | Important |
| **Argon2 hashing driver** (as alternative to bcrypt) | Nice-to-have |
| **Password validation rules** (strength requirements) | Nice-to-have |
| **Two-factor authentication** | Nice-to-have |
| **API rate limiting per auth user** (not just per IP) | Important |

---

## 11. Middleware (`middleware/`)

### EXISTS
| File | Feature |
|------|---------|
| `middleware.go` | Logger, Recover, CORS (basic), CSRF, RateLimit (in-memory), GenerateCSRFToken |
| `ratelimit_redis.go` | RateLimitRedis (distributed rate limiting with Redis) |

### MISSING
| Gap | Priority |
|-----|----------|
| **CORS with full config** (allowed methods, headers, max age, credentials — currently basic) | Important |
| **Request ID middleware** (inject X-Request-ID) | Important |
| **Trusted Proxies middleware** | Important |
| **Maintenance mode middleware** | Nice-to-have |
| **Secure headers middleware** (HSTS, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options) | Important |
| **ETag / conditional response middleware** | Nice-to-have |
| **Response compression (gzip)** | Important |
| **Body parser middleware** (configurable JSON/form size limits) | Important |

---

## 12. Logging (`logger/`)

### EXISTS
| File | Feature |
|------|---------|
| `logger.go` | Structured logging via zap (Debug/Info/Warn/Error/Fatal/With), global Set to replace logger |

### MISSING
| Gap | Priority |
|-----|----------|
| **Multiple log channels** (file, stdout, stderr, syslog, Slack/webhook) | Important |
| **Per-channel log levels** | Important |
| **Log rotation** (daily, size-based) | Important |
| **Context logging** (`logger.WithContext(ctx)` to propagate request ID, user, etc.) | Important |
| **Log formatting options** (JSON, text, custom) — currently console only | Nice-to-have |
| **Stack driver** (write to multiple channels simultaneously) | Nice-to-have |

---

## 13. Events (`events/`)

### EXISTS
| File | Feature |
|------|---------|
| `events.go` | Dispatcher with Listen, Dispatch (sync), DispatchAsync, Has, Clear, ListenerCount, lifecycle events (provider/plugin register/boot, app booted/started/shutdown, route/middleware registered, DB events) |

### MISSING
| Gap | Priority |
|-----|----------|
| **Event subscribers** (class-based: subscribe to multiple events in one struct) | Important |
| **Queued listeners** (dispatch listener to queue instead of running sync) | Important |
| **Event discovery** (auto-register events from directory convention) | Nice-to-have |
| **Wildcard listeners** (`events.Listen("user.*", handler)`) | Nice-to-have |
| **Typed events** (event structs instead of string names + any payload) | Nice-to-have |
| **Once listener** (auto-remove after first invocation) | Nice-to-have |

---

## 14. Validation (`validation/`)

### EXISTS
| File | Feature |
|------|---------|
| `validation.go` | ValidateStruct, ValidationErrors, FormatValidationError |
| `schema_rules.go` | VineJS-style typed rules: StringRule (Required, Min, Max, Email, URL, Alpha, AlphaNum, Trim, Regex, In, Confirmed, Unique, Exists), NumberRule (Required, Min, Max, Positive, Between), BoolRule, UIntRule; SchemaProvider, MessageProvider, Authorizer, Preparer interfaces; BindAndValidateSchema |
| `db_rules.go` | Database rules: UniqueOpts, ExistsOpts with custom filters |
| `form_request.go` | FormRequest[T] with Authorize, BindAndValidate |

### MISSING
| Gap | Priority |
|-----|----------|
| **Array/slice validation** (`ArrayRule` with nested rules) | Important |
| **File validation rules** (mimes, max size, dimensions) | Important |
| **Date rules** (before, after, date_format) | Important |
| **Conditional rules** (`RequiredIf`, `RequiredUnless`, `RequiredWith`) | Important |
| **Custom rule registration** (user-defined rules plugin) | Nice-to-have |
| **Nested object validation** | Important |
| **IP address, JSON, UUID rules** | Nice-to-have |
| **Bail rule** (stop on first failure) | Nice-to-have |
| **Distinct rule** (no duplicates in array) | Nice-to-have |
| **Size rule** (exact length for strings, exact value for numbers) | Nice-to-have |

---

## 15. View / Templating (`view/`)

### EXISTS
| File | Feature |
|------|---------|
| `view.go` | Edge-style template engine (.nimbus files), @layout, @if/@else/@endif, @each/@endeach, @component, @slot, includes, default helpers (raw, dump, dict, len), components directory, caching, embedded FS support |
| `view/` subdir | Additional view utilities |

### MISSING
| Gap | Priority |
|-----|----------|
| **@unless, @switch, @forelse** (empty loop fallback) | Nice-to-have |
| **@section / @yield** (more flexible than @slot for multi-section layouts) | Nice-to-have |
| **@stack / @push** (for injecting JS/CSS into layout) | Important |
| **View composers** (share data with specific views automatically) | Important |
| **View error page templates** (404, 500, 503 built-in) | Nice-to-have |
| **Template inheritance helpers** (parent/super) | Nice-to-have |

## 16. Other Packages & Modules

### What EXISTS (Fully or Partially Implemented)

| Package | Files | Status |
|---------|-------|--------|
| `auth/` | auth.go, basic.go, token.go, tokens.go, policy.go, middleware.go, email_verify.go, password_reset.go, token_middleware.go, `socialite/` | **Comprehensive** — session guard, token guard, personal access tokens, policies/gates, social auth, email verification, password reset |
| `mail/` | mail.go | **Good** — Message builder, SMTP driver, SES driver, Mailgun driver, attachments, CC/BCC/Reply-To |
| `notification/` | notification.go, channels.go, database.go, helpers.go | **Good** — Multi-channel (Mail, Broadcast, Slack, Discord, Database) |
| `session/` | store.go, cookie.go, memory.go, database.go, redis.go, middleware.go | **Good** — Multiple backends |
| `schedule/` | schedule.go | **Good** — Every, EveryMinute, Hourly, Daily, Start/Stop |
| `search/` | search.go, postgres.go, meilisearch.go, typesense.go, plugin.go | **Good** — Multi-engine (Postgres FTS, Meilisearch, Typesense) |
| `shield/` | shield.go (957 lines) | **Excellent** — AI-powered security with scoring |
| `container/` | container.go | **Good** — IoC with Bind, Singleton, Make |
| `errors/` | handler.go, devpage.go | **Excellent** — Error handler middleware, smart dev error pages with source context |
| `health/` | health.go | **Good** — Health checker with DB + Redis checks |
| `metrics/` | runtime.go | **Basic** — Runtime stats only |
| `locale/` | locale.go | **Good** — i18n with translations, Accept-Language middleware |
| `resource/` | resource.go | **Basic** — API resource transformation |
| `edge/` | edge.go (990 lines) | **Excellent** — Edge function runtime |
| `presence/` | presence.go (593 lines) | **Excellent** — Realtime presence channels |
| `tenancy/` | tenancy.go (515 lines) | **Excellent** — Multi-tenancy (row/schema/database strategies) |
| `workflow/` | workflow.go (692 lines) | **Excellent** — Durable workflow engine |
| `openapi/` | openapi.go (802 lines), plugin.go | **Good** — Full OpenAPI 3.0 spec generation |
| `websocket/` | websocket.go | **Good** — Hub, broadcast, upgrade |
| `flags/` | flags.go, plugin.go | **Good** — Feature flags |
| `packages/shield/` | CSRF + CSP plugin | **Good** |
| `packages/echo/` | Frontend package | Exists |
| `internal/deploy/` | AWS, Fly, Railway, Render deployment | **Good** |
| `internal/repl/` | Interactive REPL | **Good** |
| `provider/` | Empty | **Missing** — no example/base service providers |
| `plugin.go` | Plugin system | **Excellent** — 12 capability interfaces |

---

## Summary: Critical Gaps (Must-Fix for Production-Readiness)

| # | Area | Gap | Effort |
|---|------|-----|--------|
| 1 | **HTTP Context** | Input/query/cookie/file helpers on Context | Medium |
| 2 | **HTTP Context** | Request body binding (`c.Bind(&struct{})`) | Medium |
| 3 | **Query Builder** | WhereIn, WhereBetween, Join, GroupBy, Having, Aggregates | Medium |
| 4 | **Storage** | S3 driver | Medium |
| 5 | **Encryption** | Encrypt/Decrypt service using APP_KEY | Small |
| 6 | **CLI** | queue:work, queue:retry, queue:failed commands | Medium |
| 7 | **Testing** | Database assertions (AssertDatabaseHas/Missing/Count) | Small |
| 8 | **Router** | Per-route middleware on Route object | Small |

## Important Gaps

| # | Area | Gap |
|---|------|-----|
| 9 | Database | Cursor pagination |
| 10 | Database | Polymorphic relations (morphTo/morphMany) |
| 11 | Database | hasManyThrough / hasOneThrough |
| 12 | Database | Raw query helper |
| 13 | Database | Multiple connections / read-write replicas |
| 14 | Database | Connection pool config |
| 15 | Database | Guarded field enforcement |
| 16 | HTTP | Response download/stream/SSE |
| 17 | HTTP | Content negotiation |
| 18 | Router | Route model binding |
| 19 | Router | Fallback routes |
| 20 | Router | Per-route rate limiting |
| 21 | Storage | Storage facade with disk selection |
| 22 | Storage | Public URL generation |
| 23 | Storage | File move/copy, directory listing |
| 24 | Cache | Tags, locks, atomic increment/decrement |
| 25 | Queue | Job chaining, batching, unique jobs |
| 26 | Queue | Retry backoff strategies |
| 27 | Queue | Database failed job store |
| 28 | Config | Set at runtime, multi-env file support, validation |
| 29 | CLI | route:list, cache:clear, schedule:run, key:generate |
| 30 | CLI | make:notification, make:event, make:listener, make:policy |
| 31 | Security | XSS sanitization helpers |
| 32 | Security | Per-user API rate limiting |
| 33 | Middleware | CORS full config, request ID, secure headers, gzip, trusted proxies |
| 34 | Logging | Multiple channels, log rotation, context logging |
| 35 | Events | Event subscribers, queued listeners |
| 36 | Validation | Array/slice, nested objects, date, conditional, file rules |
| 37 | View | @stack/@push, view composers |
| 38 | Testing | Fake events, factory integration |
| 39 | Metrics | Prometheus exporter, HTTP request metrics |

## Nice-to-Have Gaps

| Area | Gap |
|------|-----|
| Database | Model casting, accessors/mutators, observers, UUID BaseModel |
| HTTP | IsAjax, IsSecure, FullUrl helpers |
| Router | Sub-domain routing, route constraints, nested resources, route caching |
| Storage | GCS driver, Azure Blob, file metadata |
| Cache | Flush, events, TTL retrieval |
| Queue | Job middleware, Horizon config-driven workers |
| Config | Caching, watching, nested map access |
| CLI | db:wipe, make:factory, env:encrypt, storage:link |
| Security | Argon2 driver, 2FA, password strength rules |
| Logging | Custom formatters, stack driver |
| Events | Wildcard listeners, typed events, discovery |
| Validation | Custom rule plugin, bail, distinct, size, IP/UUID rules |
| View | @unless, @switch, @forelse, error templates |
| Testing | Time freeze, parallel helpers, fake storage/notifications |

---

## Framework Comparison Scorecard

| Feature Area | Laravel | Nimbus | Coverage |
|---|---|---|---|
| Database/ORM | ★★★★★ | ★★★★☆ | ~80% |

**Overall Estimated Coverage: ~62% of Laravel/Rails equivalence**

### Top 5 Highest-Impact Items to Close the Gap:
1. **HTTP Context helpers** (input, files, cookies, binding) — touches every handler
2. **S3 storage driver + facade** — mandatory for production file handling
3. **Query builder completeness** (WhereIn, Join, Aggregates) — daily ORM use
4. **Encryption service** — fundamental security primitive
5. **Queue CLI commands** — cannot operate queues without them
